CONTENT.Career: In 2021, N'Guessan was sent on loan to Swiss side Lausanne-Sport from Nice in the French Ligue 1. On 24 July 2021, he debuted for Lausanne-Sport during a 2–1 loss to St. Gallen.In July 2022, N'Guessan moved on loan to Nîmes for the 2022–23 season.On 21 July 2023, he signed a 4-year contract with Ligue 1 club Metz.In February 2024, N'Guessan joined UAE Pro League side Al Wasl on a permanent deal.
CONTENT.External links: Jean N'Guessan at SoccerwayJean N'Guessan at WorldFootball.netSwiss Super League profile
CONTENT.International career: N'Guessan was called up to the Ivory Coast U23s in March 2023. He made his international debut in a 3-2 won against Morocco U-23 on 22 March 2023.

SUMMARY: Jean Frederic Kouadio N'Guessan (born 17 April 2003) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Emirati club Al Wasl.
